markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Webflow teams to discuss integration pages, editorial content, and review processes.](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New review process established for integration pages using Airtable stages and statuses](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Editorial content strategy initiated, with focus on calibrating AI-generated articles to match Webflow's voice](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Potential new content type discussed: use case articles derived from integration page inspirations](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Feedback provided on AI-generated article structure and depth, emphasizing need for more direct, developer-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)

## Topics

### Integration Page Review Process

  - [New workflow using Airtable for stages and statuses](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - ["Ready for client review" is the key status for Webflow team to check](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Google Docs used for easy reviewing and note-taking](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)
  - [Options after review: "Approved" for minor changes, "Needs revision" for major changes](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=303.0)
  - [CMS publishing process to be determined once access is granted](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Initial clusters mapped out, mixing SEO, Reddit, and Hacker News content](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=604.0)
  - [One article in Luke's voice shared for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Plan to generate about 20 integration pages per week, adjusting based on review speed](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Focus on balancing integration pages with editorial content creation](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

### Use Case Content Potential

  - [Inspiration from "What you can do" sections in integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Considering creating blog posts or guides based on these use case ideas](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Potential for aggregating common patterns across integrations, similar to Zapier's approach](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Need to balance SEO value with practical usefulness for users and support teams](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)

### AI-Generated Article Feedback

  - [Article on APIs and microservices in composable commerce reviewed](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Feedback: Too flowery, buried lead, excessive use of analogies](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Need for more direct, developer-focused content that gets to the point faster](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Suggestion to assume some base knowledge and focus more on relevance to e-commerce](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Discussed server-side rendering for SEO crawlability of integration pages](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Confirmed that Webflow CMS should handle server-side rendering appropriately](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=568.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and provide feedback on the shared AI-generated article in Luke's voice](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=638.0)
  - [Examine proposed editorial topics and clusters, focusing on one cluster for initial feedback](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [GrowthX team to develop proposal for use case content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [Regenerate API/microservices article based on feedback for a more direct, developer-focused approach](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)
  - [Add Airtable link to Slack channel for easier access](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [GrowthX team to make initial edits to the article and ping Webflow team in Slack for further review](https://fathom.video/share/aWDJRFi6coz3xuSrRvpwW869cHd4fjyd?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
